title: move deepseek-v4-flash to openrouter, remove paid-only
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Migrates `deepseek` (V4 Flash) from DeepInfra to OpenRouter and removes the `paidOnly` gate so it's available on free tier.

## Pricing (per 1M tokens)

| Provider | Input | Output | Cached |
|---|---|---|---|
| DeepInfra (was) | $0.14 | $0.28 | $0.028 |
| **OpenRouter (now)** | **$0.126** | **$0.252** | **$0.0252** |
| Azure AI Foundry | $1.03 | $4.12 | — |
| Fireworks | n/a (not hosted) | — | — |

OpenRouter is ~10% cheaper across the board and currently routes V4 Flash via Novita.

## Notes
- Original issue suggested Azure — that's 7–15× more expensive, defeats the free-tier goal.
- Fireworks doesn't host V4 Flash (only V4 Pro). Initial commit on this branch attempted Fireworks and was reverted after live API probe returned 404.
- Updated `aliases.test.ts` to reflect new provider + cost (0.4032 for 1M+1M+1M usage).

## Validation
- Live OpenRouter probe: HTTP 200, model resolved to `deepseek-v4-flash-20260423` via Novita.
- Local worker boots, `/v1/models` lists `deepseek` with tools+reasoning, 1M context.
- `vitest run test/aliases.test.ts` — 186/186 passing.

Fixes #10810

gist.headline: DeepSeek Flash is Free
gist.blurb: We've re-routed DeepSeek V4 Flash to a new provider, making it cheaper to run and completely free for everyone to use. No pollen credits required to start buzzing with this one.
gist.summary: Migrated the deepseek (V4 Flash) model from DeepInfra to OpenRouter, reducing provider costs by 10% and removing the paid-only restriction.
gist.impact: Free tier users can now access deepseek-v4-flash without needing pollen credits.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot opening a glowing treasure chest or unlocking a gate, symbolizing the model being made freely available. A 'FREE' sign highlights the removal of the paid gate.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot opening a glowing lime green (#ecf874) treasure chest. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'FREE'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
